vocab.example: I occasionally initiate a conversation with fellow commuters to pass the time during long train journeys.

vocab.meaning: trao đổi những lời xã giao lịch sự
vocab.example: While waiting for my coffee, I often exchange pleasantries with the person standing next to me in the queue.

vocab.meaning: một cuộc gặp gỡ thoáng qua
vocab.example: It was just a fleeting encounter at the bus stop, but the stranger's kind words really brightened my mood.

vocab.meaning: nhanh chóng tạo được mối liên hệ/sự đồng cảm
vocab.example: It is surprisingly easy to strike up a rapport with other dog owners when you are walking in the park.

vocab.meaning: những người giao thiệp rộng, thích gặp gỡ người lạ
vocab.example: Unlike social butterflies who thrive on meeting new people, I tend to be more reserved in public settings.

vocab.meaning: phá vỡ bầu không khí ngượng ngùng
vocab.example: Commenting on the unpredictable weather is usually the best way to break the ice with a stranger.

vocab.meaning: có bản tính thích giao du, hướng ngoại
vocab.example: My brother is gregarious by nature, so he constantly finds himself chatting with people he doesn't know.

vocab.meaning: tình cờ gặp gỡ ai đó
vocab.example: Public squares are fascinating places where you can cross paths with people from all walks of life.

vocab.meaning: tham gia vào cuộc trò chuyện phiếm/xã giao
vocab.example: I generally find it quite pleasant to engage in small talk while waiting in a doctor's surgery.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác chung về cộng đồng
vocab.example: Talking to strangers during local festivals fosters a shared sense of community among residents.
